claims.claim: Origa landing serves 4 locales (EN/RU/KO/VI) at path prefixes /, /ru, /ko, /vi, each with 5 pages (home/features/compare/content/download).
After this edit, the Vietnamese locale uses 'Hán tự'/'hán tự' for kanji throughout (term-level + meta), not the romaji 'Kanji'.
claims.note: Field identifiers kept as *_kanji_* to match Content struct in mod.rs; only string VALUES changed. The earlier replaceAll attempt corrupted identifiers — fixed via full rewrite.

claims.claim: Technical SEO infrastructure (JSON-LD SoftwareApplication/Organization/HowTo, hreflang alternates in head, canonical per-locale, og:locale + alternates, sitemap with lastmod) is already present and correct.
claims.note: No technical-SEO changes made in this work; content-only.

claims.claim: kana-dojo (lingdojo/kana-dojo) has ~2,754 GitHub stars and covers locales en/es/de/fr/zh but NOT vi or ko.
claims.note: Star count is a snapshot — recheck before any public/competitive claim.

claims.claim: Origa's GitHub repo currently has 9 topics, 1 star, has_discussions=false, description=213 chars.
claims.note: Pre-edit baseline for the repo-meta recommendations.

claims.claim: Brand rule (docs/landing-content-plan.md §10) forbids mentioning pricing, open source, license, BSL in landing copy; 'free' is permitted (app is currently free).
sources: docs/landing-content-plan.md:342 (updated 2026-06-26: 'free' removed from forbidden list per product-owner decision)
claims.note: 'free'/'бесплатно'/'miễn phí'/'무료' now used in home + download meta across all 4 locales.

claims.claim: tests/seo_meta.rs pins: RU home description must contain 'лексика' or 'кандзи'; KO featureList must contain '한자'; VI HowTo name must contain 'tiếng Nhật'; default <title> = 'Origa — Japanese Learning App'.
claims.note: All four assertions remain satisfied by the edited content. Verification delegated to cargo test (background).

claims.claim: Naver holds ~50%+ of the Korean search market share.
claims.note: [CITATION NEEDED] Sourced only from the keyword-research report's cultural note, not independently verified against a dated market-share publication. Not asserted as fact in user-facing copy — only informs the strategy note that Google-only research undercounts KO.

claims.claim: Domain origa.uwuwu.net is behind Cloudflare (migrated from Aeza), with valid IPv4+IPv6, indexable by Google/Yandex/Bing.
Vietnamese learners search 'hán tự' rather than the romaji 'kanji' for Japanese characters.
sources: docs/keyword-research-report.md:227-231,288 (Google Suggest VI data: 'hán tự' with n5/n3/n4 subtypes)
claims.note: Strong Suggest-signal; 'Hán tự' (漢字) is the established Sino-Vietnamese term.

claims.claim: Russian modifier 'на русском' for Japanese-learning apps has near-zero competition.
claims.note: Based on SERP competition signals (free tools); directionally reliable.

claims.claim: Landing meta length budgets are ~title ≤55 chars and ~description ≤130 chars.
claims.note: Brand plan is stricter (≤50/≤125); edits stay close to it. A few titles slightly exceed 50 but stay under 60 (Google's render cutoff). Documented trade-off.

claims.claim: Content edits compile cleanly and pass all SEO regression tests (cargo verification).
sources: cargo check -p origa_landing --features ssr --tests: 0 errors, 0 warnings
cargo test -p origa_landing --features ssr --test seo_meta: 11/11 passed
cargo test -p origa_landing --features ssr --test sitemap: 4/4 passed
claims.note: Full test suite (--tests all at once) hit LNK1140 MSVC PDB-limit + disk D: full — environment blocker, not code-related. Individual test binaries compile and pass.

flags: Naver market-share estimate (~50%) is unverified — only informs strategy, not asserted in user-facing copy.
